dashboard_recap.headline: MLB Daily Recap - April 23, 2026
dashboard_recap.article:
**Braves Blast Past Nationals, Dodgers Shut Down Giants**

The Atlanta Braves took down the Washington Nationals 7-2 behind a strong performance from Ozzie Albies, who homered for the fifth time this season. Albies finished with three hits, one home run, and four RBIs, leading the Braves' offense. On the mound, JR Ritchie earned the win for Atlanta, while Cade Cavalli impressed for Washington with five shutout innings. The Braves' victory marked their second straight win, as they look to build momentum.

In other action, the Los Angeles Dodgers dominated the San Francisco Giants 3-0, thanks in large part to Tyler Glasnow's eight shutout innings. Glasnow struck out nine and allowed just one hit, leading the Dodgers to their second consecutive win. Meanwhile, the Chicago White Sox took down the Arizona Diamondbacks 4-1, with Andrew Benintendi homering for the second time this season.

all_games.summary: The Atlanta Braves defeated the Washington Nationals 7-2 behind Ozzie Albies' 3-hit, 4-RBI performance, including his fifth home run of the season.
